name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Account Discovery
notes: This building block detects cloud account discovery commands.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Account Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System, BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution, Audit.Command Execution Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get-msolrolemember%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE 'az ad user list' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'aws iam list-users' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'aws iam list-roles' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'gcloud iam service-accounts list' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'gcloud projects get-iam-policy') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Account Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System, BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution, Audit.Command Execution Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get-msolrolemember%') OR  (LOWER("Command") LIKE 'az ad user list' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'aws iam list-users' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'aws iam list-roles' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'gcloud iam service-accounts list' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE 'gcloud projects get-iam-policy') AQL filter query
